Author: EliteEchelons
CommentText: I'll admit that it doesn't look as bad as some of the shit SGA pulls off, but it still leaves a bad taste in my mouth when players are 90% clearly looking for contact and maybe 10% hoping that their chaotic shot goes in. I think I was more frustrated by the constant stoppage and the struggle to slow him down that I started perceiving it as a lot more egregious than it really was. I get the strategy and skill it takes to pull this stuff off, I just wish it wasn't so influential that it's borderline essential to participate in it.
